title: ilex khasiana
intro: Ilex khasiana, a species of evergreen plant, is a small tree or shrub that belongs to the family Aquifoliolidae and is native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex khasiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Ilex khasiana typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
